title: Replace PWA icon with user-provided image and remove yellow pulsing dot from Globe tab

requirements.text: Replace the generated PWA icon images with the user-provided image from https://wkeve-6yaaa-aaaaf-qahcq-cai.raw.icp0.io/storage?contentId=kl67x-j6c5g-ptso3-xq4fe-kmcuc-trzl2-nzxqt-qjedv-j3y4m-3746e-tqe-image-29480. Download this image and use it as the PWA icon for both the 256px and 512px entries in frontend/public/manifest.json. Remove any previously generated PWA icon assets and update all references in manifest.json and frontend/index.html accordingly.

quotes: use this image for the PWA image, remove the one you generated: https://wkeve-6yaaa-aaaaf-qahcq-cai.raw.icp0.io/storage?contentId=kl67x-j6c5g-ptso3-xq4fe-kmcuc-trzl2-nzxqt-qjedv-j3y4m-3746e-tqe-image-29480

acceptanceCriteria: The user-provided image URL is downloaded and saved as a static asset in frontend/public/
manifest.json icon entries (256px and 512px) reference the new image file
No previously generated PWA icon assets remain referenced in manifest.json or index.html
The app installs with the correct custom icon on supported devices

requirements.text: Remove the yellow pulsing dot/marker from the Globe tab (GlobeView component). The pulsing dot that appears on the 3D globe to indicate a station's geographic location must be hidden or removed entirely from GlobeView.tsx.

quotes: the globe tab needs the yellow pusling dot removed

acceptanceCriteria: No yellow pulsing dot or animated marker is rendered on the globe in the Globe tab (GlobeView)
Station location points on the globe remain functional and clickable if applicable, only the yellow pulsing animation is removed
The globe renders without any pulsing dot animation at any station coordinate

constraints: Do not modify any files under frontend/src/hooks/ immutable paths
Use the exact user-provided image URL as the source for the PWA icon replacement
Do not alter the FullscreenGlobe component — only target GlobeView.tsx for the pulsing dot removal
nonGoals: Redesigning the globe view or changing other visual elements
Changing any other PWA manifest properties beyond the icon assets
